Cortex AI Implementation

Realistic Blueprint Based on Actual GitHub Repository State

2
Languages Built
12
Languages Planned
6-9mo
To Full Launch
Part 01 · Current State

GitHub Repository Reality Check

⚠️ Important Finding
The landing page claims "12+ languages" but the actual codebase only supports English and Hindi. This blueprint reflects the real implementation state.

Repository Statistics

MetricValueStatus
Commits8⚠️ Very Early Stage
Stars1⚠️ Needs Marketing
Forks0⚠️ No Community
README.md❌ Missing🔴 Action Required
Landing Page✅ Beautiful🟢 Aspirational Claims

What's Actually Built

✅ Frontend Stack

React 18 + Vite + TypeScript + Zustand + Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion

✅ Backend Stack

Express 5 + TypeScript + Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL

✅ AI Integration

Google Gemini (2.5 Flash) with LangGraph-style workflow

🔄 Languages

Only English (EN) + Hindi (HI) implemented. TTS for both.

❌ Teacher Dashboard

UI exists but backend integration NOT built

❌ Analytics

No usage tracking or progress analytics implemented

Language Implementation Status

Current vs. Target

🇺🇸

English (EN)

TTS implemented, UI ready, full support

✅ Built
🇮🇳

Hindi (HI) - हिंदी

TTS implemented, UI ready, full support

✅ Built
🇮🇳

Tamil (TA) - தமிழ்

Not implemented, requires ASR/NMT/TTS

📅 Q2
🇮🇳

Telugu (TE) - తెలుగు

Not implemented, requires ASR/NMT/TTS

📅 Q2
🇮🇳

Marathi (MR) - मराठी

Not implemented

📅 Q3
🇮🇳

Bengali + 8 more

Not implemented, lower priority

📅 Q4+
📋 Implementation Requirements Per Language
Each additional language requires: Speech Recognition (ASR), Machine Translation (NMT), Text-to-Speech (TTS), Font support, UI translation, Curriculum alignment
Part 03 · Technical Architecture

Language Processing Pipeline

Current Architecture (EN/HI Only)

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ USER INPUT │ │ (Text or Voice - EN/HI only) │ └─────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘ │ ▼ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ FRONTEND (React PWA) │ │ Input → Language Detection → API Call │ └─────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘ │ ▼ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ API SERVER (Express) │ │ Route → Validate → Transform │ └─────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘ │ ▼ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ AI SERVICE (Gemini 2.5 Flash) │ │ Context → Curriculum Map → Response │ └─────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘ │ ┌───────────┴───────────┐ ▼ ▼ ┌──────────────────┐ ┌──────────────────┐ │ English TTS │ │ Hindi TTS │ │ (Built) │ │ (Built) │ └──────────────────┘ └──────────────────┘

Required Architecture for 12 Languages

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ USER INPUT │ │ (Text or Voice - Any Language) │ └─────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘ │ ▼ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ LANGUAGE DETECTION SERVICE │ │ Detect: HI, TA, TE, MR, BN, KN, ML, GU, OR... │ └─────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘ │ ▼ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ TRANSLATION SERVICE (NMT) │ │ Bhashini API / Google Translate / Azure AI │ │ Target: EN (for AI processing) │ └─────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘ │ ▼ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ AI SERVICE (Gemini 2.5 Flash) │ │ Process in English, preserve context │ └─────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘ │ ▼ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ REVERSE TRANSLATION SERVICE │ │ Translate response back to user's language │ └─────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘ │ ┌───────────┴───────────┬─────────────┐ ▼ ▼ ▼ ┌──────────────────┐ ┌────────────────┐ ┌───────────┐ │ Hindi TTS │ │ Tamil TTS │ │ ... │ └──────────────────┘ └────────────────┘ └───────────┘

Technology Additions Needed

ServiceProviderCostLanguages
Translation APIBhashini (Free)Free tierAll 12
Speech RecognitionBhashini / Google₹0.5/1000 charsAll 12
Text-to-SpeechBhashini / Google₹1/1000 charsAll 12
Part 04 · Implementation Plan

Phased Language Expansion Roadmap

Phase 1: Foundation (Month 1-2)

Week 1-2

Documentation & Cleanup

  • Add README.md to GitHub repo
  • Create SETUP.md with accurate language info
  • Fix landing page claims (12+ → 2)
  • Update SETUP.md with language status
Week 3-4

Language Infrastructure

  • Integrate Bhashini API for translation
  • Add language detection middleware
  • Create translation service wrapper
  • Set up TTS service abstraction

Phase 2: First Expansion (Month 3-4)

Month 3

Add Tamil (TA)

  • ASR integration for Tamil voice input
  • TTS integration for Tamil responses
  • UI translation for Tamil interface
  • Curriculum mapping for Tamil board
Month 4

Add Telugu (TE)

  • ASR integration for Telugu voice input
  • TTS integration for Telugu responses
  • UI translation for Telugu interface
  • Curriculum mapping for Telugu board

Phase 3: Second Expansion (Month 5-6)

Month 5

Add Marathi + Bengali

  • Marathi (MR) - ASR/TTS/UI
  • Bengali (BN) - ASR/TTS/UI
Month 6

Add Gujarati + Kannada

  • Gujarati (GU) - ASR/TTS/UI
  • Kannada (KN) - ASR/TTS/UI

Phase 4: Final Expansion (Month 7-9)

Month 7-8

Add Remaining Languages

  • Malayalam (ML)
  • Odia (OR)
  • Punjabi (PA)
Month 9

Quality & Optimization

  • Performance optimization
  • Quality assurance for all languages
  • Documentation for 12 languages
  • Marketing materials update
Part 05 · Technical Details

Language Service Implementation

1. Bhashini Integration

# Environment Variables
BHASHINI_USER_ID=your-user-id
BHASHINI_API_KEY=your-api-key
BHASHINI_BASE_URL=https://meity-auth.ulcacontrib.in

# Service endpoints
TRANSLATION_API=ai4bharat/translation
ASR_API=ai4bharat/asr
TTS_API=ai4bharat/tts

2. Language Detection Service

// lib/language-detection/detectLanguage.ts
import { predict } from 'lingua-node';

export async function detectLanguage(text: string): Promise<LanguageCode> {
  const result = await predict(text);
  const langMap = {
    'hindi': 'hi',
    'tamil': 'ta',
    'telugu': 'te',
    'marathi': 'mr',
    'bengali': 'bn',
    // ... etc
  };
  return langMap[result.language] || 'en';
}

type LanguageCode = 'en' | 'hi' | 'ta' | 'te' | 'mr' | 'bn' | 'gu' | 'kn' | 'ml' | 'or' | 'pa' | 'as';

3. Translation Service

// services/translation/translate.ts
import { BhashiniClient } from './bhashini-client';

export async function translateToEnglish(
  text: string,
  sourceLang: LanguageCode
): Promise<string> {
  const client = new BhashiniClient();
  return client.translate({
    input: text,
    sourceLanguage: sourceLang,
    targetLanguage: 'en'
  });
}

export async function translateFromEnglish(
  text: string,
  targetLang: LanguageCode
): Promise<string> {
  const client = new BhashiniClient();
  return client.translate({
    input: text,
    sourceLanguage: 'en',
    targetLanguage: targetLang
  });
}

4. Language Router Middleware

// middleware/languageRouter.ts
export const languageRouter = async (req, res, next) => {
  const userLang = req.user?.preferredLanguage || 'en';

  // Wrap AI response
  const originalJson = res.json.bind(res);
  res.json = async (data) => {
    if (data.content && userLang !== 'en') {
      data.content = await translateFromEnglish(data.content, userLang);
    }
    return originalJson(data);
  };

  next();
};
Part 06 · Missing Features

Teacher Dashboard Implementation

⚠️ Current State
Teacher dashboard UI exists in the landing page mockups but NO backend implementation exists. This needs to be built from scratch.

Required Backend Features

Student Analytics API

Endpoints to fetch student progress, engagement metrics, topic completion rates.

Class Overview API

Aggregate metrics for entire class: average scores, common struggles, attendance.

Intervention Alerts

Automated alerts when students fall behind or show declining performance.

Assignment Integration

Create and assign practice sets based on class weaknesses.

API Endpoints Needed

# Teacher Dashboard Endpoints
GET    /teacher/classes                    # List teacher's classes
GET    /teacher/classes/:id/students      # Students in class
GET    /teacher/classes/:id/analytics     # Class analytics
GET    /teacher/students/:id/progress      # Individual progress
GET    /teacher/students/:id/interventions # Intervention history
POST   /teacher/assignments                # Create assignment
GET    /teacher/topics/:id/struggles      # Topic difficulty analysis

Database Tables Required

TablePurpose
class_enrollmentsLink students to classes
teacher_classesLink teachers to classes
student_progressTrack learning progress per topic
intervention_logsRecord teacher interventions
assignmentsTeacher-created assignments

~198,000 credits to complete all promised features
vs. original estimate of 305,000-440,000 (which assumed nothing was built)
Part 08 · Next Steps

Immediate Action Items

This Week

Day 1-2

GitHub Cleanup

  • Create README.md with accurate info
  • Fix SETUP.md language claims
  • Update landing page (optional)
Day 3-4

Bhashini Setup

  • Create Bhashini account
  • Get API keys
  • Set up language detection
Day 5-7

First Language Service

  • Build translation wrapper
  • Test Hindi ↔ English
  • Integrate with chat flow

Month 1 Milestone

🎯 Goal: Infrastructure Ready

Translation service abstracted, language detection working, architecture ready for 10 more languages without code duplication.

Month 3 Milestone

🎯 Goal: 4 Languages Live

English, Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu fully functional with voice I/O, TTS, and curriculum alignment.

Month 6 Milestone

🎯 Goal: 12 Languages + Dashboard

All 12 languages functional, teacher dashboard with analytics, ready for school partnerships.

Part 09 · Summary

Summary & Recommendations

Honest Assessment

ClaimLanding PageReality
Languages12+2 (EN, HI)
Pilot schools60 (aspiration)
Improvement rate94%Not measured
Teacher dashboardBuiltUI only
2G optimizedYesNot implemented

Path Forward

1. Be Honest

Update landing page and materials to reflect actual state. Build trust through transparency.

2. Focus on Quality

Get 4 languages working perfectly before expanding. Quality over quantity.

3. Build Incrementally

Add languages one at a time. Each language should take 2-4 weeks, not months.

4. Measure Everything

Track actual usage, improvement rates, engagement. Only claim metrics you can prove.

💡 Key Insight
The foundation (React frontend, Express backend, Gemini AI) is solid. The main work remaining is adding language support and teacher dashboard. This is achievable in 6-9 months with focused effort.

Ready to Start?
